purpose: Defines the master-orchestrator subagent role for Claude Code. YAML frontmatter declares its name, description (Synapse swarm master), the four skills auto-loaded for it (p-track, worker-protocol, master-protocol, failure-protocol), and the role-specific hooks (PreToolUse on Edit|Write -> validate-master-write.sh; Stop -> verify-final-report.sh). The body restates the master's five responsibilities (Gather Context, Plan, Dispatch, Status, Report) and the hard constraint that the master writes ONLY to dashboards/{id}/{plan,initialization,logs,master_state,metrics}.json + Archive/, never project source code. References that plan.json must be written BEFORE initialization.json (hook-enforced via validate-plan-required.sh).
gotchas: YAML frontmatter is structural — Claude Code parses skills[] and hooks[] from it; bad indentation breaks the agent definition silently
Role-specific hooks here are duplicated in .claude/settings.json (which applies globally) — the agent-level hook block declares the agent's own enforcement contract
The 'never write project code' rule is enforced by validate-master-write.sh — but this file is the prose source of truth that humans read
patterns: Subagent definition pattern: YAML frontmatter (name/description/skills/hooks) + Markdown body with role description
References skills by short name (no path) — Claude Code resolves to .claude/skills/{name}/SKILL.md
conventions: Description starts with capital, summarizes when to use
Body opens with 'You are...' second-person framing
